theme.rationale: Large corporates and government tenders require a highly credible, authoritative, and serious presentation. The Light theme ensures dense technical data (testing parameters, waste categories) is highly legible. The deep navy structural elements provide the gravitas of a large industrial infrastructure company, while emerald green acts as a high-contrast trigger for conversions (WhatsApp/Quote).

brand.name: NilayNarayan Polychem LLP
brand.identity: Industrial company in Speciality Chemicals Manufacturing, Authorized Hazardous Waste Management & Recycling, and NABL Accredited Environmental Testing Lab

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight leading-none text-slate-900
hierarchy.h1_dark: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight leading-none text-white
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-semibold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-slate-500

layout.spacing_system: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, py-20, py-32 for sections to convey premium scale.

grid_strategy.marketing: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris) for Services and About sections to create visual tension.
grid_strategy.dashboard: Control Room Grid (Mode B) for the Admin panel to maximize data density.

surfaces.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), no default shadow. Sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm).
surfaces.header: Crystal Glass variant: bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200. Sticky top-0 z-50.
surfaces.dark_sections: bg-[#0B192C] text-white. Use grain texture overlay if possible.

buttons.primary: bg-[#047857] text-white hover:bg-[#065F46] rounded-sm font-semibold transition-colors duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-slate-300 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-sm font-semibold
buttons.whatsapp: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-105 transition-transform bg-[#25D366] text-white p-3

shadcn_customization.instructions: Override default Vercel aesthetic. Set radii to 0px or 2px. Remove soft drop shadows. Use 1px solid borders. Use IBM Plex Sans for all form inputs and data tables.

motion.philosophy: Minimalist and precise. No bouncy animations. Industrial design demands precision.
motion.hover_states: Interactive cards translate-y-[-4px], border color changes to primary (#047857), add shadow-md.

hero_bg.description: Premium industrial facility at dusk, to be used with a deep navy gradient overlay.

process_flow_bg.description: Abstract 3D topographical process network, use behind the Process Flow diagram.

lab_testing.description: High-tech environmental testing lab macro shot for the NABL Lab section.

industrial_warehouse.description: Expansive industrial warehouse interior for the About us or Vision/Mission section.

lab_scientist.description: Close-up of a scientist conducting an experiment.

hazardous_waste_handling.description: Worker in a protective suit monitoring pollution.

Home.hero: H1: Integrated Hazardous Waste Management & Environmental Solutions. CTAs: Request Quote, Contact Us. Use hero_bg image.
Home.about_snapshot: Bento grid layout with high-level stats (e.g., Years of Experience, Waste Managed).
Home.core_services: 2 large cards (Hazardous Waste Mgmt, NABL Lab) with sharp borders.
Home.process_flow: Horizontal timeline diagram overlaid on the abstract process_flow_bg.
Home.industries_served: Grid of minimal cards with industrial icons.

pages_and_features.About: Vision, Mission, Infrastructure highlight using the industrial_warehouse image.
pages_and_features.Services: Parent page for services. Hazardous Waste Mgmt: Detailed capabilities (TSDF, Co-processing). NABL Lab: Scope of testing, sample collection info using lab_testing and lab_scientist images.
pages_and_features.Products: Grid of products with 'Download TDS/SDS' small buttons.
pages_and_features.Projects_Certifications: Grid/List of case studies. Certifications with PDF download links.
pages_and_features.Contact_Us: Contact form with multiple fields + Call/WhatsApp/Email buttons + Google Maps embed.
pages_and_features.Admin_Panel: Dark sidebar (#0B192C) with white main content area. Dashboard for reviewing submitted enquiries.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure fonts: Cabinet Grotesk (headings) and IBM Plex Sans (body). Use next/font or standard imports.
Set up Tailwind colors exactly as specified in the palette.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts (bento grids, overlapping elements). Only use Shadcn for forms, inputs, dialogs, and tables.
Implement Floating WhatsApp CTA and a Sticky Header with the Crystal Glass effect.
Do NOT use placeholder images (e.g., via.placeholder.com). Strictly use the images provided in the image_urls block.
Make sure forms have proper hover, focus, and disabled states.
Apply 'Grid Borders' layout (border-collapse style) for repetitive feature grids to look more technical and industrial rather than standard isolated cards.
